error_signature: sub-workflow outputs a single item instead of multiple
title: Sub-workflow only returns a single output item
symptom: When executing a sub-workflow in 'Run once for each item' mode, it only outputs a single item instead of multiple items as expected.
applies_when: Using a sub-workflow with 'Run once for each item' mode
not_this_if: Sub-workflow does not contain a Wait node
Expecting synchronous behavior without a Wait node
root_cause: The presence of a Wait node in the sub-workflow causes each item to execute in a detached manner, preventing the parent workflow from waiting for all executions to complete before returning results.
fix_steps: Remove the Wait node from the sub-workflow to keep it synchronous
Ensure that 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion' is enabled
Alternatively, store results externally and consolidate them in a separate workflow
agent_instruction: Remove the Wait node from the sub-workflow to ensure all items are processed synchronously.
